title: DAOHub - Build & Govern Your DAO

metaDescription: DAOHub - Decentralized Autonomous Organization governance platform
summary: DAOHub - Decentralized Autonomous Organization governance platform
description: DAOHub - Decentralized Autonomous Organization governance platform
prompt: Build a premium crypto website inspired by DAOHub - Build & Govern Your DAO. Keep the page polished, high-trust, and conversion-ready with responsive sections and clear hierarchy.
layoutNotes: Imported from Website Template Hub as a local source-backed template.
Preview and downloadable code are generated from the original HTML source.
Asset paths are normalized so the template can preview inside Multiverse.
responsiveNotes: Responsive layout comes from the original one-page template source.
Preview uses the real HTML file instead of a synthetic poster image.

files.summary: Main template source file imported from Website Template Hub.
files.content:
DAOHub
Explore DAOs Governance Treasury Resources
Explore DAOs Governance Treasury Resources
Decentralized Governance

Build Your
Decentralized DAO

Create and manage decentralized autonomous organizations with full governance control. Token-based voting, treasury management, and community-driven decisions on DAOHub.

12.5K

Active DAOs

$125B

Treasury Value

Top DAOs on DAOHub

Join thriving decentralized communities

Active

MetaGov DAO

Community-driven governance for metaverse protocols

Voting Power Distribution

Treasury: $8.2M
Members: 4,250+
Active

TreasuryVault DAO

Decentralized investment fund management

Voting Power Distribution

Treasury: $45.8M
Members: 12,890+
Active

LearnDAO

Educational content and scholarship governance

Voting Power Distribution

Treasury: $12.4M
Members: 8,340+

Governance Features

Flexible Voting

Implement any voting mechanism: token-based, quadratic, multi-sig, or custom. Set voting periods, proposal thresholds, and quorum requirements.

Smart Contracts

Automated proposal execution through smart contracts. Set time locks, execute treasury transfers, and manage protocol upgrades transparently.

Treasury Analytics

Track all treasury transactions in real-time. Multi-sig wallets, spending limits, and budget allocations for responsible fund management.

Community Forums

Built-in discussion boards for proposals and ideas. Connect with other DAO members, share research, and debate direction together.

DAO Treasury Dashboard

Complete transparency and control over your DAO's finances

Total Assets

$125M

+18% YoY

Active Proposals

24

Voting in progress

Members

15K+

Active governance

Resources & Tools

Documentation

Complete guides for DAO creation and management

Developer API

Integrate DAO functionality into your app

Courses

Learn DAO governance best practices

Community

Connect with other DAO creators

Join thousands of communities governing Web3 together
